race.comment: BILLIONAIRE'S ROW (2) is a lightly raced galloper in the top barn and can build on his 1500m Maiden win at Ascot. Finally draws an inside gate and Lucy Fiore stays aboard. Promising and can take the next step. SOVEREIGN SALUTE (1) tackled 1600m for the first time, beaten 1.2L from the pace at Pinjarra. He's also got plenty of scope for improvement and gets in well with the 3kg claim. The side gate is against, but he can fight out the finish with average luck. MYZOOM (13) brings a narrow defeat in a CL1 over this trip at Ascot. There was a lot to like about that, and she's a hope down in the weights. KAZANA (10) raced at Group and Listed level last preparation, but she got too far back over 1400m at Pinjarra first-up. She was well supported and can show a lot more stepping up to 1600m.
